description: Polyglot code-locate golden set (task 88). Validates the M11 code locator — including the task-87 module-doc capture — across the six non-Rust AST languages (Python, Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, C#, Java). memhub's own tree is pure Rust, so this golden is NOT run against memhub via the `memhub eval locate` CLI (which indexes the current repo); it is run only by tests/locate_polyglot.rs, which writes these fixtures into a throwaway git repo and calls `eval::run_locate` over it. Matchers run case-insensitive substring checks against each locate hit's repo-relative `path` (and optional `symbol`), exactly as tests/code_locate_golden.json does. `*-moduledoc` queries carry NO `symbol_contains` and phrase the file's PURPOSE the way it appears in the leading module/package/file doc comment, so they exercise the module-doc chunk path rather than a symbol name. `kind: empty` queries are nonsense safety probes; like the Rust golden they only reject under `--rerank --min-rerank-score`, which is the floor signal this set measures.

queries.query: where is payment capture and refund handling for the checkout service
queries.notes: Python module docstring capture; the purpose lives in the leading triple-quoted docstring, not a symbol.

queries.query: authorize a card charge against the payment gateway
issue a refund for a settled transaction
planar geometry helpers for the mapping subsystem
queries.notes: Go package doc capture; the purpose lives in the `// Package geo ...` comment.

queries.query: compute the straight line distance between two coordinates
a two dimensional coordinate in the plane
browser session token lifecycle for the web client
queries.notes: TS file JSDoc capture; detached `/** @module ... */` before the first export.

queries.query: create a new browser session from a token and a time to live
check whether a session has expired
exponential backoff retry helper for flaky network calls
queries.notes: JS file JSDoc capture; detached `/** @module ... */` before the first export.

queries.query: retry an asynchronous operation with exponential backoff
compute the delay before the next retry attempt
warehouse stock ledger tracking for the fulfillment pipeline
queries.notes: C# file doc capture; detached `/// <summary>` before the using preamble.

queries.query: reserve stock units for a sku
how many units are available for a product
token bucket rate limiting for the public api gateway
queries.notes: Java file doc capture; detached `/** ... */` before the package preamble.

queries.query: try to acquire tokens from the bucket

queries.notes: Pure nonsense — rejects only under a rerank floor; documents that fusion-only locate has no nonsense gate (mirrors the Rust golden).
